pos_sentences: Rajagiri College offers numerous opportunities, including Vanavasam, Rural camp and event management experience.
This college offers high quality infrastructure with modern campus amenities and advanced learning facilities.
Rajagiri college has a diverse community with many international students from countries like Africa, Syria, and Germany.
reviews.title: My college review
reviews.name: ANAGHA P V

content.title: Admission
content.content: After my entrance exams I first applied to Rajagiri college. Because it is very famous college in kerala. Many famous celebraties and their childeren studing here. And the fees structure is less compared to other good colleges. There are also placements oppurtunities here.

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content: PGDM program is more pratical than theoritical. Thats why i take PGDM. For real world applications in academics faculties give us example and simulations. This helps to understand the real world applications. The timing and frequency of exams are in perfect. In exam time there will no classes.

pos_sentences: There are opportunities to grow personally both professionally and personally, college will provide lots of such opportunities to participate in various events.
Campus is good with lots of greenery and backside there is a river view
Campus life is very active with lots of events all are conducted by students.
neg_sentences: No medical facility in the campus and nearby hospitals are so costly
Big campus but only two cafeteria which is not enough that too so less options to explore
reviews.title: College Review
reviews.name: Review Rebel

content.title: Admission
content.content: Fees is comparatively less compared to othe b schools also they claim they provide internship opportunity from college and also good placements. Admission process consist of cleaning cut off then GD, Business awareness test and PI

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content: Lots of classes are scheduled feels hectic do not get enough time to even prepare for exams. Quality of education must be improved a little more through technological integrations. For seniors there are night classes as well.

pos_sentences: Offers international exposures through semester abroad programmes, internationalization programmes and student exchange programmes
reviews.title: PGDM at Rajagiri Business School
reviews.name: AKHIL JOSEPH

content.title: Admission
content.content: Rajagiri Business school is considered the best private business school is kerala. It is not much difficult to get in here. The candidates should have passed CAT/KMAT/CMAT/MAT. Then the shorlisted candidates will go through a group discussion round and personal interview round.

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content: The syllabus of the course is updated periodically to ensure the relevancy of the subjects. It also focuses more on practical approach rather than mere theoretical studies. Well maintained simulations are used to provide us with a practical exposure.

pos_sentences: College do provide an immense amount of opportunities to develop or enhance our skills.
They have clubs,activtities,and management fest,All the activites are student driven. Faculties are highly qualified and majority completed their pg from IIM and IIT etc.
College do provide exposure to meet and interact with Eminem personalities and provide opportunity for networking.
reviews.title: Rajagiri college-Best college in all aspects
reviews.name: Irfana fathima

content.title: Admission
content.content:
I have applied only to scms Kochi.
After that, I got admission into Rajagiri.
Rajagiri is one of the leading PG colleges in Kochi.
And I know some seniors there, and they all suggested being part of Rajagiri instead of scms as Rajagiri has more placements, they provide more cultural activities and entertainment.

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content:
They do have relevance in the curriculum. They do provide practical insights through a mandatory internship for 2 months which should not be in Kerala.
Also, they do give simulations in the lab.
Frequency of timing of exams, since it is trimester-3 sem, a year its very hectic and overloaded.

content.title: Admission
content.content: Our college is good in everyways, it is in a good location

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content: For PGDM there are 3 sem in a year. For evry subject there is med term and end term examination all subjects also have assignment amd presentation. Talks from famous personality and renowned personal are conducted always helping to groom ourselves into a betters managers

content.title: Admission
content.content: The positive part about college is that even the schedule of the colleges are very strict and followed properly college finds time provide please students like many many sports events and compulsory green activities and also can students learn to live different experience.

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content: It's good with less burden for students and importance for all areas in academics. It not only focus on exams it also try to develop skills and evaluate them using the other tools like Presentation skills, discussion skills etc.

content.title: Admission
content.content: My overall experience at this college was good and the campus life was amazing, I had a good time with my classmates and friends. Our college was well facilitated and the placement and summer internships were also provided.

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content: I pursued the PGDM course and the course curriculum was good, it is equivalent to the MBA course. I opted for Marketing and Human Resource management as my specialized area. Also, the exams were conducted at the end of every semester.

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content: The course curriculum of our college was pretty detailed and updated as per the companies or industries requirements. They offered dual specialized area and I opted for Marketing and Finance as my specialized area.

content.title: Placement Experience
content.content: The placement cell provides 100% assistance to the students. Companies like Coca-Cola, Decathlon,  Deloitte, etc. visited our college. The maximum salary package offered was Rs. 12 LPA, the average was Rs.5 LPA and the minimum was Rs. 3 LPA.

content.title: Admission
content.content: It helps the students to face the real world situation in our life. They gives us a clear picture of how to behave in an organization and to deal with all the co-employees in an organization. It helps me to take the right decision.

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content: The course that I am studying right now is quite good and practical. It focus on the students career and the project research done by the students. It provide many other certification courses that will help us to face the real world situatuon. The exam are conducted both by online and ofline. Since it was a professional course sometimes it use to be hectic with all the assignments and project work.

reviews.title: A period of Great experience and friendship
reviews.name: Genimon

content.title: Admission
content.content: The campus and life I like most.  The ethical aspect and the supportive nature of the college is appreciable. The over all experience of the 2 year program me is of professional in nature

content.title: Course Curriculum Overview
content.content: I selected MBA in Finance, which  is rated as the best of the time for me. As it was a professional course, the practical side was well taken in to consideration. We had research participation with faculty. We had electives as SAPM and DP

article.description:
Rajagiri Business School Kochi , popularly known as RBS Kochi, is located in Kochi, Kerala and was established in 2008 as a Private college.The College offers a wide range of, postgraduate, and Fellowship programs. In 2024, Rajagiri Business School Kochi was ranked 49 in India by the NIRF in Management category and in 2025, by collegedunia it ranked 188 in India in MBA (Global) courses.

Rajagiri Business School Kochi offers PGDM as its flagship program, with eligibility requiring a minimum of 50% marks in graduation and at least 50 percentile in any one of the recognized entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT, or RRAT. The final selection process includes the RBS Admission Test (RRAT), followed by Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI), along with an evaluation of the candidate’s overall performance.The PGDM fee structure INR 8.62 Lakhs for the entire duration.

Rajagiri Business School Kochi , Also offers a Fellowship program in management , with eligibility required to have a minimum of 60% marks or a CGPA of 6.5 in a 10-point scale and candidate age not exceeding 55 Years.The FPM fee structure INR 6 Lakhs for the entire duration.

As per the NIRF data 2024,the Median Package was INR 7 LPA with 204 students got placement.Top recruiters included Deloitte, Decathlon, HDFC Bank,KPMG,EY, Ferrero India, Marico, Dabur, ITC among others

Table of Contents
  1. Rajagiri Business School Kochi Highlights
  2. Rajagiri Business School Kochi Admission Dates 2026
  3. Rajagiri Business School Kochi Courses & Fees 2026
  4. Rajagiri Business School Kochi Admission 2026

    4.1 Rajagiri Business School Kochi Application Fees 2025

    4.2 Rajagiri Business School Kochi Application Process 2026

  5. Rajagiri Business School Kochi Kolkata Cutoff 2026
  6. Rajagiri Business School Kochi Placements 2025
  7. Rajagiri Business School Kochi Scholarships 2026
  8. RBSK vs GBSK vs NDIM vs IRMJ
  9. Rajagiri Business School Kochi Campus & Infrastructure
  10. Rajagiri Business School Kochi FAQ

Rajagiri Business School Kochi Highlights

The key highlights for Rajagiri Business School Kochi are mentioned below:

Rajagiri Business School Kochi Courses & Fees 2026

Rajagiri Business School Kochi offers PGDM as a Flagship Program. All the courses offered by Rajagiri Business School Kochi have unique course curricula. Tabulated below are the Rajagiri Business School Kochi Courses & Fees:

Courses Eligibility Total Fee
PGDM Minimum 50% in Graduation + Entrance Score INR 8.6 Lakhs
Fellowship Graduation with Minimum 60% or a CGPA of 6.5 in a 10-point scale INR 6 Lakhs

Rajagiri Business School Kochi Admission 2026

Rajagiri Business School Kochi offers MBA (Global) and PGDM as its flagship programs. For MBA (Global) and PGDM admission, candidates must have a 50% in 10+2+3 and have a valid CAT Score or equivalent exam score.The final selection is based on the interview performance, academic records, work experience, and competitive exam scores.

Rajagiri Business School Kochi Application Fees 2025

Application Fees 2025 for candidates applying at Glosyn Business School Kolkata are given below:

Domestic Students Foreign Students
CAT Fee:
  • General / EWS / NC-OBC: INR 2,600
  • SC / ST / PwD: INR 1,300
XAT Fee:
  • Standard registration fee: INR 2,200
  • Additional fee (XLRI programs): INR 200 per program
RBS-K Application Fee: INR 1000		 RBS-K Application Fee: USD 50 (approx. INR 4,000)

Rajagiri Business School Kochi Application Process 2026

Rajagiri Business School Kochi offers PGDM as its flagship program, with eligibility requiring a minimum of 50% marks in graduation and valid score in any one of the recognized entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT, or RRAT. The final selection process includes the Rajagiri Research Aptitude Test (RRAT), followed by Group Discussion (GD) and Personal Interview (PI), along with an evaluation of the candidate’s overall performance

ADMISSION PROCESS
Fellowship Program in Management (FPM)
Test Required RRAT and JRF
Eligibility Minimum 60% or 6 CGPA in Masters degree
Final Selection Rajagiri Research Aptitude Test (RRAT+Interview (for RRAT cleared candidates) (JRF candidates are exempted from RRAT)
Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM)
Test Required CAT/MAT/CMAT/XAT/ATMA.
Eligibility Minimum 50% in Bachelor’s degree
Merit Basis A valid score in the approved management entrance examinations. The valid score is the cut-off mark notified by RBS from time to time
Final Selection Group Discussion, Personal Interview and Written Skills Test (GD-PI-WST)

Rajagiri Business School Kochi Scholarships 2026

Rajagiri Business School Kochi distributes scholarships on the basis of need and merit of the students. Need-based scholarships are made available to students belonging to economically disadvantaged families. The list of Rajagiri Business School Kochi Scholarships awarded in 2025 are given below:

Scholarship Criteria

A comparison among the top Colleges that offer management programs i.e.Rajagiri Business School Kochi , New Delhi Institute of Management (NDIM) and Institute of Rural Management Jaipur(IRMJ)are mentioned in the table below:

Parameter RBSK IRMJ NDIM
Established Year 2008 1994 1992
IIRF Ranking 2025 NA NA 48
PGDM Admission Eligibility Graduation with 50% + CAT Graduation with 50% + CAT Graduation
Flagship Course PGDM MBA & PGDM PGDM

CAT Cutoff (2024) 50% 80% 70
Highest Package(2024) NA INR 20 LPA NA

Rajagiri Business School Kochi Campus & Infrastructure

Campus & Infrastructure

Rajagiri Business School in Kochi boasts a modern and eco-friendly campus that blends academic excellence with state-of-the-art facilities. The campus is equipped with spacious classrooms featuring smart learning technology, a well-stocked library with digital resources, and high-speed internet connectivity across the premises. Students have access to advanced computer labs, auditoriums for seminars, and dedicated discussion rooms for collaborative learning. The campus also houses research and innovation centers to encourage experiential learning and industry-relevant projects. A lush green environment with landscaped gardens provides an ideal setting for a positive learning experience.

In addition to academics, the campus offers excellent recreational and wellness facilities to ensure holistic student development. There are indoor and outdoor sports areas for basketball, football, badminton, and other activities. Fitness enthusiasts can make use of the fully equipped gym, while a well-maintained cafeteria offers nutritious and diverse meal options. Medical assistance is available on campus to handle emergencies, ensuring the safety and health of students. The presence of cultural and activity clubs adds vibrancy to campus life, promoting leadership and personality development.

Hostel Facilities

Rajagiri Business School offers well-maintained hostels for both male and female students, located close to the campus for easy access. Rooms are fully furnished with essentials like beds, study tables, Wi-Fi, and adequate storage. The hostels provide hygienic dining facilities with balanced meals and regular housekeeping services.

Security is a top priority, with 24/7 surveillance and dedicated wardens. Additional amenities include laundry, common recreation areas, and round-the-clock water and electricity supply. The environment ensures safety, comfort, and a supportive community for students to focus on academics and overall development.

Rajagiri Business School Kochi FAQ

Ques. What is Rajagiri Business School Kochi and when was it established?

Ans. Rajagiri Business School Kochi, popularly known as RBS Kochi, is a premier private management institution established in 2008. Located in Kochi, Kerala, it offers a variety of postgraduate and fellowship programs designed to meet global standards. The college is known for its modern campus, international accreditations, and industry-focused curriculum that prepares students for managerial roles in top organizations.

Ques. What are the flagship programs offered by Rajagiri Business School Kochi?

Ans. Rajagiri Business School Kochi offers PGDM as its flagship program and a Fellowship Program in Management. The PGDM program has specializations such as Business Analytics and General Management, ensuring students gain expertise in core business areas. The Fellowship program caters to individuals interested in academic research and advanced studies in management.

Ques. What is the admission process for PGDM at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?

Ans. Admission to the PGDM program at Rajagiri Business School Kochi requires candidates to have a minimum of 50% in graduation and valid scores in exams like CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT, or RRAT. The final selection process includes the Rajagiri Research Aptitude Test (RRAT), followed by Group Discussion and Personal Interview. Candidates are evaluated on academic performance, communication skills, and overall personality.

Ques. What is the eligibility for the Fellowship Program at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?

Ans. The Fellowship Program at Rajagiri Business School Kochi requires candidates to have a minimum of 60% marks or a CGPA of 6.5 on a 10-point scale in their Master’s degree. Additionally, the applicant’s age should not exceed 55 years. Selection involves the Rajagiri Research Aptitude Test and interview, although JRF-qualified candidates are exempted from the test.

Ques. How much is the course fee at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?

Ans. Rajagiri Business School Kochi charges INR 8.6 Lakhs for its flagship PGDM program and INR 6 Lakhs for the Fellowship Program in Management. The fee covers tuition, academic resources, and access to campus facilities. The school also provides financial aid and scholarships to deserving candidates, helping to make quality education affordable.

Ques. How does Rajagiri Business School Kochi rank among business schools in India?

Ans. Rajagiri Business School Kochi has been consistently recognized among top business schools in India. In 2024, it was ranked 49th in the NIRF rankings under the Management category, reflecting its strong academic quality and placement record. In 2025, Collegedunia ranked it 188th in India for MBA (Global) programs. These rankings highlight its growing prominence in management education.

Ques. How are placements at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?

Ans. Rajagiri Business School Kochi has an impressive placement record with reputed companies participating every year. As per the 2024 NIRF data, 204 students were placed with a median salary package of INR 7 LPA. Top recruiters include Deloitte, Decathlon, HDFC Bank, KPMG, EY, ITC, Dabur, Marico, and Ferrero India. The dedicated placement cell ensures students are industry-ready through internships and skill development programs.

Ques. What scholarships are offered by Rajagiri Business School Kochi?

Ans. Rajagiri Business School Kochi provides merit-based and need-based scholarships to eligible candidates. These include Diversity Scholarships for students from outside Kerala and Career & Talent Scholarships for high achievers in entrance exams like CAT. The scholarship amount can range up to 75% of the tuition fee, reducing the financial burden and encouraging academic excellence.

Ques. What are the infrastructure and campus facilities at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?

Ans. Rajagiri Business School Kochi offers a modern campus with smart classrooms, digital libraries, advanced computer labs, and research centers. Students enjoy recreational facilities such as indoor and outdoor sports, a fully equipped gym, and vibrant cultural clubs. A well-maintained cafeteria, medical assistance, and high-speed internet ensure a comfortable and holistic learning experience.

Ques. Does Rajagiri Business School Kochi provide hostel facilities?

Ans. Yes, Rajagiri Business School Kochi provides separate hostels for male and female students, located close to the campus. Rooms are furnished with essentials like beds, study tables, and Wi-Fi, and the hostels offer hygienic dining services. Security is ensured with 24/7 surveillance and dedicated wardens, creating a safe and comfortable living environment for students.

replies.content: Kindly contact on rajgiri Business school office number- 484 242 6554 or 484 2660555 to know about the admission updates and availability.

comments.content: What is the faculty student ratio of RBS Kochi?

replies.content: The faculty-student ratio of this institute is not mentioned by the Rajagiri Business School, Kochi. You can visit the official website of the college for the information. Or else, you can directly contact the admission department of the college on this number and check for the faculty-student ratio and other details in the college: 0484-2426554.

comments.content: Does RBS Kochi hostels have single occupancy rooms?

replies.content: Yes, RBS Kochi has single occupancy rooms available for the students. Besides this, the hostel rooms are distributed on double and triple occupany. Read More: RBS Kochi Hostel

02 Sep, 2025 XAT 2026 registration has started for MBA/PGDM admission. Aspirants can apply online till December 5, 2025, @xatonline.in. XAT 2026 will be held on January 4, 2026, from 2 PM to 5 PM. For more details, Check Here.

schemaJsonLd.1: {"@context":"http:\/\/schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":" What is Rajagiri Business School Kochi and when was it established?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Rajagiri Business School Kochi, popularly known as RBS Kochi, is a premier private management institution established in 2008. Located in Kochi, Kerala, it offers a variety of postgraduate and fellowship programs designed to meet global standards. The college is known for its modern campus, international accreditations, and industry-focused curriculum that prepares students for managerial roles in top organizations."}},{"@type":"Question","name":" What are the flagship programs offered by Rajagiri Business School Kochi?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Rajagiri Business School Kochi offers PGDM as its flagship program and a Fellowship Program in Management. The PGDM program has specializations such as Business Analytics and General Management, ensuring students gain expertise in core business areas. The Fellowship program caters to individuals interested in academic research and advanced studies in management."}},{"@type":"Question","name":" What is the admission process for PGDM at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Admission to the PGDM program at Rajagiri Business School Kochi requires candidates to have a minimum of 50% in graduation and valid scores in exams like CAT, MAT, CMAT, XAT, or RRAT. The final selection process includes the Rajagiri Research Aptitude Test (RRAT), followed by Group Discussion and Personal Interview. Candidates are evaluated on academic performance, communication skills, and overall personality."}},{"@type":"Question","name":" What is the eligibility for the Fellowship Program at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" The Fellowship Program at Rajagiri Business School Kochi requires candidates to have a minimum of 60% marks or a CGPA of 6.5 on a 10-point scale in their Masters degree. Additionally, the applicants age should not exceed 55 years. Selection involves the Rajagiri Research Aptitude Test and interview, although JRF-qualified candidates are exempted from the test."}},{"@type":"Question","name":" How much is the course fee at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Rajagiri Business School Kochi charges INR 8.6 Lakhs for its flagship PGDM program and INR 6 Lakhs for the Fellowship Program in Management. The fee covers tuition, academic resources, and access to campus facilities. The school also provides financial aid and scholarships to deserving candidates, helping to make quality education affordable."}},{"@type":"Question","name":" How does Rajagiri Business School Kochi rank among business schools in India?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Rajagiri Business School Kochi has been consistently recognized among top business schools in India. In 2024, it was ranked 49th in the NIRF rankings under the Management category, reflecting its strong academic quality and placement record. In 2025, Collegedunia ranked it 188th in India for MBA (Global) programs. These rankings highlight its growing prominence in management education."}},{"@type":"Question","name":" How are placements at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Rajagiri Business School Kochi has an impressive placement record with reputed companies participating every year. As per the 2024 NIRF data, 204 students were placed with a median salary package of INR 7 LPA. Top recruiters include Deloitte, Decathlon, HDFC Bank, KPMG, EY, ITC, Dabur, Marico, and Ferrero India. The dedicated placement cell ensures students are industry-ready through internships and skill development programs."}},{"@type":"Question","name":" What scholarships are offered by Rajagiri Business School Kochi?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Rajagiri Business School Kochi provides merit-based and need-based scholarships to eligible candidates. These include Diversity Scholarships for students from outside Kerala and Career & Talent Scholarships for high achievers in entrance exams like CAT. The scholarship amount can range up to 75% of the tuition fee, reducing the financial burden and encouraging academic excellence."}},{"@type":"Question","name":" What are the infrastructure and campus facilities at Rajagiri Business School Kochi?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Rajagiri Business School Kochi offers a modern campus with smart classrooms, digital libraries, advanced computer labs, and research centers. Students enjoy recreational facilities such as indoor and outdoor sports, a fully equipped gym, and vibrant cultural clubs. A well-maintained cafeteria, medical assistance, and high-speed internet ensure a comfortable and holistic learning experience."}},{"@type":"Question","name":" Does Rajagiri Business School Kochi provide hostel facilities?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":" Yes, Rajagiri Business School Kochi provides separate hostels for male and female students, located close to the campus. Rooms are furnished with essentials like beds, study tables, and Wi-Fi, and the hostels offer hygienic dining services. Security is ensured with 24\/7 surveillance and dedicated wardens, creating a safe and comfortable living environment for students."}}]}
